message:
test: add 63 proptest property tests for identity_graph

Comprehensive proptest coverage for the security-critical identity graph
module: principal identity stability, trust level ordering/transitivity,
action semantics, grant validity/coverage/subset, resource matching
(wildcard, fleet), delegation cycle detection (with known limitation
documented), group inheritance, authorization decisions, expiration
sweeps, telemetry counters, audit log bounds, and serde roundtrips for
all types.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
